name: Phosphodiesterase type 5 inhibitor differentiation based on selectivity, pharmacokinetic, and efficacy profiles
summary: Comparative review describing shared PDE5/NO-cGMP mechanism and differentiating sildenafil, tadalafil, and vardenafil by selectivity, pharmacokinetics, duration of action, food effects, and common vasodilatory adverse events.

access_attempts.result: NCBI E-utilities abstract and metadata accessed; browser access to PubMed/PMC was blocked by bot check.
access_attempts.notes: Used abstract statements on shared mechanism, approximately 4-hour sildenafil/vardenafil duration, tadalafil responsiveness up to 36 hours, high-fat food effects, and common vasodilatory adverse events.
